title: デビュー戦の後に・突然の大宣言！

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess that's that.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: How was that for a debut, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Shocking? Stupefying? Do I have what it takes to
be a champion?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: However... this was only my first flight.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Is this all I've got?! No! I'm only gonna get
stronger from here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa has made a successful debut, but
her sights are still set far higher.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You did great, El. You were really sharp out
there.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You were certainly... what's the word? Dynamic?
You really spanked everyone out there!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass! Sei! You're right! We should give all the
slowpokes a spank to get them moving!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to tell whether they're all on the same
page or not, but it seems like they're
communicating.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You'll do great in the Classics if you keep this up,
El!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The Classics...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ahem. Trainer, everyone. I have something to say.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's about... my future. Try not to do a backflip
out of shock, okay?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I, El Condor Pasa, the world's very own Phantom
Bird...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Will not be running in the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're skipping the Classics?! Is that even
allowed?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Slackin' off 'cause it seems like a pain? Don't go
stealin' my moves now...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But, El... Are you being real right now? Like,
really real?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
M-maybe I misspoke... I don't mean I definitely
won't run in them. It's just...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The Classics aren't what I'm aimin' for! I wanna be
strongest in the world, not just strongest in my
generation!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
While everyone else is goin' for the Triple
Crown...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I wanna win the Japan Cup in my classic year!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning the Japan Cup in one's classic year is a
feat of almost unimaginable difficulty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only is she not yet fully grown, but she'll have
to take on some of the strongest senior-year
racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, this is very like El Condor Pasa. The
faster she wins the Japan Cup, the faster she can
challenge the rest of the world.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well... you've chosen a path far more difficult
than what any of us expected.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna miss racing you, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's got different goals. If you're happy,
that's what matters.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No matter what path you take, you'll always be
my rival.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I just have to accept it... and wish you luck. I hope
that our paths cross again.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, bueno! Bueno! Everyone's kindness is
hitting me like a waterfall...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! It doesn't matter what path we take,
you're all my amigas! Let's all do our best!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All five of their promises ring out into the night
and across the stars. With this, El Condor Pasa
swears to take the skies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now all that's left is for the two of us to decide
her next race. I bring it up when we're alone.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Our next goal is already decided!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You think it's too soon? I feel like we've already
flown through the fall sky, though.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If we don't go to the Japan Cup, then where do
we go?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are two usual paths in one's classic
year—the Triple Crown tour or the Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, it's difficult if you don't choose
either. I ask her which she'd prefer, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yeahhhh... neither!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I don't really know that much about the
classic year...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I think it'd be better to run as soon as possible in
a race that's not too stacked. Somewhere not too
long, but not too short.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What middling requirements... But that leaves us
with a time period between January and right
before the Classic races start in March.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something between a 1,600-meter mile and a
2,000-meter medium race would be good...
choice_data_list: How about the Kyodo News Hai in February?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
February! The end of winter. The perfect time to
prepare for spring.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Not too long and not too short. That sounds
juuust right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The very definition of a medium-distance race. It
should be perfect for her.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then it's decided! My next race will be the Kyodo
News Hai!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And we'll just train and plan like crazy until then.
